text: formulate a system prompt that can be added to a project where aimparency is added/applied
description: maybe make the snipped detectable and the backend server checks for common coding assistant project configs like gemini and claude markdown files and then a popup proposes to insert or update the snipped with the most recent aimparency mcp how to (for the LLM)

status.comment: Created standard Agent Instructions in shared/src/agent-instruction.ts. Implemented backend procedure 'injectAgentInstructions' to inject/update these instructions in .gemini/GEMINI.md, CLAUDE.md, and .cursorrules. Added 'Agent Integration' section to Project Settings modal to trigger this update.
